evidence.claim: When an interaction occurs, the system processes the event.
evidence.fact: It automatically logs each login attempt and any modification to transaction status, storing the precise moment it occurred.
evidence.user_story_span: When the system processes the event

evidence.claim: The system maintains an audit log that records all security-relevant events with precise timestamps.
evidence.fact: The system maintains a chronological record of every authentication event and transaction state change, each annotated with the exact time.
evidence.user_story_span: maintain an audit log that records all security-relevant events with precise timestamps
evidence.fact_span: a chronological record of every authentication event and transaction state change, each annotated with the exact time
